behavior_changes.title: Bug 36862037: SQL Server - Standardize the SQL Server driver string in odbcinst.ini
behavior_changes.description: Beginning with Oracle GoldenGate 23.6, the provided ODBC driver for SQL Server changed from libmsodbcsql-18.3.so.2.1 to libmsodbcsql.so and the driverâs name in the odbcinst.ini file has changed from ODBC Driver 18 for SQL Server to Microsoft ODBC Driver for SQL Server.
